scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:superadmin && npm run build:marketing
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:superadmin && npm run check:user && npm run check:guard && npm run check:marketing
scripts.check:backend: npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/api run test && npm --prefix apps/api run build
scripts.check:user: npm --prefix apps/resident-mobile run lint && npm --prefix apps/resident-mobile run test:ci
scripts.check:guard: npm --prefix apps/guard-mobile run lint && npm --prefix apps/guard-mobile run test:ci
